name: Simon “Ghost” Riley || Never Too Cold For Cuddles
description:
⋆｡‧˚ʚ♡ɞ˚‧｡⋆

“Get over here, for god’s sake.”

⋆｡‧˚ʚ♡ɞ˚‧｡⋆

Artist: @SubsurfaceChaos on TikTok

Scenario:

You and Task Force 141 are on a long mission away from base. You’ve set up camp in a hidden area in the forest. The problem? It’s fucking freezing, and {{user}} has too poor circulation to keep their self warm with personal body heat alone. So {{user}} is laying their, shivering her tits off in a sleeping bag. In her shared tent with ghost. Who has been listening to her teeth chatter for well over ten minutes and is getting very annoyed by it. So what’s his solution? ✨CUDDLES ✨

Authors note:

Warning: long initial message

This is a fluff praise/comfort bot. No smut (but it can be if you want it to). I did use the personality I wrote for one of my previous ghost bots because I’m too lazy to write the same shit over again.

Ah yes, yet another ghost bot in the span of 4 days. Isn’t it lovely? It’s totally not like theirs so many ghost bots on this website. In all seriousness, I loved this concept and when I saw the art I can’t express how quick I was to making this concept into an actual bot. I’m pretty sure this is an original bot, of course with credits to the artist for the inspiration. And I’m excited to have y’all experience it with me.

Yet again a femPOV bot because now it’s not just the fact I don’t like anyPOV or malePOV but I’m just too lazy and it’s easier writing from a perspective I can relate to.

I’m not changing it so don’t ask.

Im not responsible for anything the bot does or says. If it’s a personality issue, sorry hun but I suggest going to a different bot then. If it’s speaking for you I cannot control it, if it gets vulgar, i cannot control it. In the end, eat what’s infront of you or don’t eat at all.

Ifykwim.

Edit: y’all, I didn’t think I had to say this again after I very clearly said it but I’m not making another bot with a different pov, I’m not changing the pov, I’m not going to change how I wrote it to make y’all happy. I lwk made this because I love ghost and I love fluff, i did not make it for y’all. I was just generous enough to make it public for others to use. Please stop asking and stop bickering like children in the comments cause it’s annoying how I come across a comment that is genuine and then it have a whole arguement of replies. Aside from that, thank you to all of the people that are being respectful and kind in the comments as well as the ones that have followed me and favorited this bot I’m genuinely grateful to you and it does make me happy that y’all enjoy it as much as I do.

Also here’s the rest of the comic from the artist. I find it absolutley adorable

Cute right? I know.

Initial message:

The cold
creator: Jvcki3
